chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْأَخْذِ بِالسُّنَّةِ وَ شَوَاهِدِ الْكِتَابِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – The taking by the Sunnah and the evidence of the Book (Quran)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (229/ 1)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (229/ 1)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنْ خَالَفَ كِتَابَ اللَّهِ وَ سُنَّةَ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَدْ كَفَرَ .

en.hubeali: And by this chain, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of his companions who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The one who opposes the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the Sunnah of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>, so he has disbelieved’.
en.sarwar: 6. It is narrated through the same chain of narrators from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of his people who has said the following. “Abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said, ‘Whoever disagrees with the book of Allah and the Sunnah of Prophet Muhammad (s.a.) he has certainly become a unbeliever.’”
